title: Knockback Resistance
description: Determines an entity's resistance to knockback from melee attacks. A value of 0.0 means no resistance, while 1.0 provides full immunity to knockback (like iron golems).

value.title: Value
value.description:
The amount of knockback resistance, from 0.0 (none) to 1.0 (full immunity).

Sample values:
• armor_stand: 1
• ender_dragon: 100

max.title: Maximum Value
max.description:
Maximum potential knockback resistance for this entity.

Sample values:
• ender_dragon: 100
